defmodule Myapp.Application do
  use Application
  alias Myapp.Config
  
  def start(_type, _args) do
    port = Config.get(:port)
    children = []
    Supervisor.start_link(children, strategy: :one_for_one)
  end
end

args.old_content:
defmodule Myapp.ConfigTest do
  use ExUnit.Case
  alias Myapp.Config
  
  test "get/1 retrieves config" do
    assert Config.get(:port) == 4000
  end

args.new_content:
defmodule Myapp.SettingsTest do
  use ExUnit.Case
  alias Myapp.Settings
  
  test "get/1 retrieves config" do
    assert Settings.get(:port) == 4000
  end
end

content.text: Good. Last one is auth_test.exs

defmodule Myapp.AuthTest do
  use ExUnit.Case
  
  test "secret_key uses Config" do
    assert Myapp.Auth.secret_key() == Myapp.Config.get(:secret)
  end
end
